closeout_summary: Electrical sub-contractor on a commercial fit-out: LV final circuits, lighting and cable containment delivered, but closeout slipped on outstanding testing and commissioning records.
report_text: Scope covered LV sub-mains, final circuits, lighting installation and cable containment on a commercial fit-out package.
Workmanship on power distribution and busbar trunking was acceptable, with re-work required on containment routing.
Closeout was delayed: testing and commissioning certificates and as-fitted records were outstanding well past practical completion.

projects.project: Cheung Sha Wan commercial fit-out — electrical
projects.note: Closeout delayed ~10 weeks; T&C and as-fitted records outstanding past PC.

closeout_summary: Strong electrical contractor: LV main switchboard, sub-mains, final circuits, lighting installation, cable containment and busbar trunking delivered on programme with clean testing and commissioning.
report_text: Delivered the LV main switchboard, sub-mains and final circuits with lighting installation and small power across the floors.
Cable containment, busbar trunking and power distribution were installed to a high standard with full testing and commissioning to the CoP.
Closeout was on time: as-fitted drawings, T&C records and O&M manuals submitted at practical completion with no outstanding items.

projects.project: Tseung Kwan O office tower — LV distribution and lighting
projects.note: On-time closeout; commended for quality of testing and commissioning records.

projects.project: Kowloon East data hall — power distribution
projects.note: Clean handover of power distribution and containment.

closeout_summary: Reliable mid-size electrical contractor: lighting, small power and containment on retail and podium works, handed over without major snags.
report_text: Lighting installation, small power and cable containment delivered on a retail podium package.
Final circuits and distribution boards completed; minor snagging on lighting controls closed before handover.

projects.project: Sha Tin retail podium — lighting and small power

closeout_summary: Capable electrical contractor on institutional works: containment and final circuits delivered; one historical safety matter on record.
report_text: Cable containment and final circuits installed on an institutional building, with distribution and lighting to the specified scope.
Testing and commissioning completed; closeout records submitted at practical completion.

projects.project: Hung Hom institutional building — containment and final circuits

closeout_summary: Mechanical and plumbing contractor: HVAC, ductwork and pipework on a hospital package, delivered to programme.

Commissioning of air handling and pump sets completed; closeout on time.

closeout_summary: Plumbing and drainage specialist: domestic water, drainage and sanitary fit-out on residential works.
report_text: Domestic cold and hot water, above-ground drainage and sanitary installation across residential floors.
Pressure testing and commissioning completed; clean handover.

projects.project: Yuen Long residential — plumbing and drainage

closeout_summary: Mechanical contractor: ductwork and ventilation on industrial works; a payment dispute remains on record from a separate project.
report_text: Ventilation ductwork and mechanical services installed on an industrial workshop.
Mechanical commissioning completed; closeout records submitted.

closeout_summary: Fire services contractor: sprinklers, detection and alarm on a commercial tower, FSD inspection passed first time.
report_text: Sprinkler installation, fire detection and alarm, hydrants and hose reels across a commercial tower.
FSD inspection passed; certification and as-fitted records handed over at completion.

projects.note: On-time closeout; FSD pass first time.

closeout_summary: Fire services contractor: hydrants, hose reels and alarm on an office building, handed over cleanly.
report_text: Hydrants, hose reels, fire detection and alarm installed on an office building.
Commissioning with FSD completed; closeout on time.

projects.project: Kwun Tong office — hydrants and alarm

closeout_summary: Fire services contractor: sprinklers and detection on a public building; later removed from the approved list.
report_text: Sprinkler and detection installation on a public building package.
Closeout completed on this project before the firm's later removal from the approved list.

projects.project: Sham Shui Po public building — fire services

closeout_summary: Reinforced concrete contractor: RC frame and superstructure on a large public works package, delivered to programme.
report_text: Formwork, rebar fixing and concreting for an RC superstructure frame on a large public works package.
Concrete cube results within tolerance; closeout on time despite a tight programme.

closeout_summary: Formwork and concrete contractor on residential works: structure delivered, but closeout slipped on outstanding cube records and making good.
report_text: Formwork, rebar fixing and concreting across residential floors.
Closeout was delayed: outstanding concrete cube records and making-good items carried past practical completion.

projects.note: Closeout delayed ~8 weeks; cube records and making good outstanding.

Integrity tests passed; closeout on time.

closeout_summary: Fit-out and joinery contractor: partitions, ceilings, doors and bespoke joinery on a flagship retail unit.
report_text: Partitions, suspended ceilings, doors, finishes and bespoke joinery on a flagship retail fit-out.
Snagging closed before opening; clean handover.

closeout_summary: Fitting-out contractor: partitions and ceilings on a large headquarters fit-out, delivered to programme.
report_text: Partitions, ceilings, doors and finishes across a large corporate headquarters fit-out.
Closeout on time with full O&M and as-fitted records.

closeout_summary: Joinery contractor: bespoke joinery and finishes on a boutique hotel, handed over cleanly.
report_text: Bespoke joinery, timber finishes and doors on a boutique hotel fit-out.
Snagging closed; clean handover at practical completion.

closeout_summary: Ground-investigation subcontractor: drainage field test rig and instrumentation set up and delivered; closeout acceptable with minor reinstatement re-work.
report_text: Scope covered the drainage field test rig manufacture and mobilisation, set up at each test location, and the field installations and instrumentation for the test.
Workmanship on the test rig and monitoring instruments was competent, with minor reinstatement re-work on the drainage modification.
Closeout was acceptable, with freeboard removal and reinstatement closed out shortly after the drainage field test completed.
